description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after Minnie Mouse, a well-known Disney character. The toy features a large pink bow with white polka dots on its head, prominent black mouse ears, and a cheerful face with embroidered eyes and a smiling mouth. It is dressed in a pink dress with white polka dots, matching pink shoes, and white gloves on its hands. The surface appears soft and fuzzy, typical of plush toys, with visible stitching along the seams. The toy's limbs are slightly outstretched, and the overall build is rounded and cuddly, designed for children to hold or hug.
description: A soft, plush Minnie Mouse stuffed toy with a pink polka-dot dress and bow, white gloves, and pink shoes. The toy has a cheerful face and a cuddly, rounded shape.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile of Minnie Mouse, highlighting the pink bow, ear, and the left arm extended forward.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back of the head, ears, and dress, with both arms and legs visible from behind.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, with the right arm and leg visible, and the face turned to the left.
description_view_3: Front view showing the full face, pink bow, dress, and both arms and legs, with a clear view of the toy's cheerful expression.
attribute_facial_expression: The toy has a cheerful, smiling facial expression with wide, embroidered eyes and arched eyebrows. The mouth is curved upward, giving a friendly and welcoming appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly outstretched and legs apart, head facing forward.
